summary: Test suite covers core happy paths and basic error handling (missing config, invalid JSON, no matrix key, size validation) but has critical gaps. Missing: verification of actual matrix combinations (tests only check array lengths, not correctness); edge cases (3+ dimensional matrices, empty arrays, partial exclude matches, invalid input types); shellcheck validation; and workflow file/fixture definitions (referenced but not shown). Violates requirement that ALL tests run through act—generate-matrix.bats tests script directly. Without seeing fixtures and workflow implementation, cannot verify integration correctness. Good test isolation and naming, but assertions are fragile (substring grep) and lack structural validation of output JSON.
